data.content: Plan complete. The bug is localized to the advanced dispatch pool row layout in src/components/settings-pools-section.tsx, where PoolAgentRow uses a fixed-width agent label column that does not account for AgentDisplayLabel rendering multiple pills. Implementation should switch that row to a content-aware layout, most likely a CSS grid with explicit columns for agent identity, weight input, flexible bar, percentage, and remove button. Validate with a layout contract test plus manual verification in Settings > Dispatch > Advanced using a multi-pill agent such as an opencode/openrouter Mistral entry.
